subject: Human Resources
title: Training and Development
description: Learn Training and Development in one minute.

hook.text: A CFO asks: 'What if we train people and they leave?' The CEO replies: 'What if we don't and they stay?'

buildup.text: Training builds skills employees need now. Development prepares them for future roles and challenges.

discovery.text: Effective programs blend classroom learning, on-the-job experience, mentoring, and self-paced study.

twist.text: Most training fails because it's a one-time event. Real development is continuous and reinforced over time.

climax.text: Companies that invest in learning attract top talent and adapt faster to change.

punchline.text: Train for today. Develop for tomorrow.

quiz.question: What's the difference between training and development?
options: Training is for current skills; development is for future growth
